# go-chi/chi

> Package chi is a small, idiomatic and composable router for building HTTP services.

## API Reference

- [github.com/go-chi/chi/v5](/docs/go-chi-chi/package-root.html): Package chi is a small, idiomatic and composable router for building HTTP services.
- [middleware](/docs/go-chi-chi/pkg-middleware.html): github.com/go-chi/chi/v5/middleware
- [API Reference](/docs/go-chi-chi/): github.com/go-chi/chi/v5
